## Verification

- [ ] `python3 -m pytest`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall apps/api packages`
- [ ] API import check
- [ ] CLI help check
- [ ] Renderer build
- [ ] Renderer service build
- [ ] Docker compose build or documented reason skipped
- [ ] Fixture smoke or documented reason skipped

## Public Repo Hygiene

- [ ] No real API keys, cookies, private paths, real media, uploads, outputs, or generated clips
- [ ] `.env.example` placeholders only
- [ ] Output contract changes documented
